wikitext:
[]: Book that Rei is reading in 1.11 Post by Mt Olympus » Sun Feb 26, 2012 6:48 am I'm curious about the book that Rei is reading while in the hospital room with Shinji in 1.11. Is it a bible? In one of the images you can see a Japanese character; can anyone make out what it is? The images can be zoomed in up to 1080p http://i.imgur.com/PJ6Ly.jpg http://i.imgur.com/n9wUJ.jpg http://i.imgur.com/1wZx5.jpg http://imgur.com/a/rUSey#PJ6Ly

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 26, 2012 7:07 am Here's your answer: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/5023/The-Happy-Prince-and-Other-Tales-and-Rei-and-Stuff/

[]: Post by Mt Olympus » Sun Feb 26, 2012 7:15 am Oh, thanks very much!
